title: GuvFX Dataset Manifest v1
description: Provider-independent manifest describing a derived/curated dataset so it is reproducible from immutable raw inputs plus recorded config. Artefact location is a logical/configurable reference, never a personal absolute path.

schema_version.description: Contract version of this manifest record.

interval.description: Frequency/interval of the dataset rows (e.g. M1). No interval is assumed by this schema.

source_objects.description: Immutable raw source objects (id + checksum) the dataset derives from.

schema_versions.description: Contract schema versions the dataset rows conform to.

code_commit.description: Code version/commit that produced the dataset.

config_hash.description: Hash of the configuration used to build the dataset.

point_in_time_policy.description: Stated point-in-time correctness policy applied (e.g. availability-time gating, no look-ahead).

partition_count.description: Number of partitions/files comprising the dataset.

content_checksums.description: Map of artefact name -> SHA-256 content checksum.

quality_result.description: Quality validation outcome for the dataset build.

artefact_location.description: Logical/configurable reference to where the artefacts live (e.g. a GUVFX_DATA_ROOT-relative logical path). Never a personal absolute path.

limitations.description: Known limitations or caveats. Empty array means none stated.
